name: Neha Patil
summary: Neha describes her journey of resilience, clearing AFCAT multiple times and finally getting recommended in her final attempt through sheer persistence.
data: This was my fourth and final attempt. Previously, I was conference out twice. The key change I made this time was self-reflection. I asked myself why I failed: I was trying too hard to portray a perfect image. This time, I went with an open mind. In the SRT (Situation Reaction Test), I wrote realistic, practical answers instead of heroic, impossible ones. In the group planning exercise, I focused on immediate, logical steps. During the interview, when asked about my previous failures, I admitted my weaknesses and explained how I worked on them. Success comes to those who do not give up.
